summary: Created volumetric point cloud generator module with five 3D shape generators (sphereVolume, shell, torusVolume, noiseLattice, spiralField). Each generator produces deterministic Float32Array positions via seeded PRNG. Integrated into pointCloud.ts by replacing the inline shell/interior loop with a call to generateVolumetricPoints(), selecting shape deterministically from the seed. Existing post-processing (lattice snapping, softness modulation) preserved. All 35 new tests pass (31 generator + 4 integration), full suite of 600 tests green, build clean.
